race.comment: ESCARGOES (5) is a locally trained gelding resuming after having mixed success last time in. Sent out at his fourth run for the prep when disappointing as fav with a narrow second over 1200m at Moruya in a Super Maiden. Key jockey change today with the two lead-up trials and expected to go close from the low draw. GALACTIC FORCE (14) kept fresh and having his first start for the Sara Ryan yard. Placed once from his five starts in Victoria and drops in weight with a host of gear changes. Stays in the calculations. LAST TOUR (7) chipped away late first-up with an encouraging fourth over 1000m at Wyong. Should come on now with the run and the 3kg claim will help his cause. SMOKE 'N' DARTS (1) sat on the speed and battled on okay into second place last time out over 1100m at this track. Can give a sight again
